title: USD Reference Composition Spec Coverage Ledger

normative_source.rule: The pinned composition, document_data_model, file_formats, and stage_population specifications are normative. This ledger covers bounded in-memory external reference composition over supplied layers.

status_values.implemented: In scope for the reference-namespace-source contract and covered by goldens.
status_values.partial: A bounded subset is included and later contracts must extend it.
status_values.deferred: Specified behavior intentionally not included in this first reference contract.
status_values.out_of_scope: Belongs to another subsystem or future skill.

coverage_rules: The provider composes references and delegates stage traversal to usd-stage-population.
The first provider consumes already-opened reference layers, not asset identifiers or resources.
A generated target may claim bounded recursive reference expansion only across supplied already-opened layers.
A generated target must not claim payloads, asset resolution, or full value resolution from this provider.

obligations: Read direct external reference arcs from the base source-visible references field.
Use supplied already-opened reference layers keyed by authored asset identifier.
Map the target prim path and descendants under the referring prim path.
items.deferred_reason: This first provider does not resolve or open reference assets.

obligations: Use the referenced layer defaultPrim when an external reference has an asset but no target path.
Diagnose asset-only references when the referenced layer has no defaultPrim.
Local base-source fields are stronger than referenced target fields.
A local over must not erase a weaker referenced def for population-facing specifier output.
Local child and property opinions are composed after referenced opinions.
Order reference opinions authored deeper in namespace stronger than reference opinions authored higher in namespace.
Preserve source-visible authored list order for sibling reference arcs authored at the same prim.
Expose fields, child names, property names, and contributing sources in that strong-to-weak reference-family order before the composition arbitrator applies cross-family LIVERPS.
items.deferred_reason: This remains partial because full cross-layer reference listOp composition is not included.

obligations: Retain reference-family opinions separately from local base-source opinions even when a flattened NamespaceSource view is also exposed.
Allow downstream providers such as relocates to consume referenced opinions at a path without also consuming local base-source opinions at that path.
Preserve typed source/spec-path provenance for the reference-family view.
Expose the composed reference tree through the namespace-source boundary.
Allow usd-stage-population to populate referenced prims and properties without evaluating reference arcs itself.
Preserve composed child and property ordering when consumed by stage population.
Report missing supplied reference layers clearly.
Include the authored asset identifier in diagnostics.
Do not construct a successful namespace source when a direct required reference layer is absent.
Expand references authored inside referenced target subtrees while their authored asset layers are supplied.
Compose parent and nested namespace mappings so chained reference target prims contribute at the exposed scene path.
Detect recursive reference cycles by asset identifier, target path, referring prim path, and mapping context.
Diagnose cycles and missing nested dependency layers without unbounded recursion or crashes.
positive_goldens: nanousd compliance usda/test_composition_implied_inherits recursive reference dependency fixture
items.deferred_reason: This remains partial because asset resolution, cross-layer reference listOp composition, layer-offset value application, and variant-contained references are not included.

obligations: When a referenced layer stack authors layerRelocates and also authors nested references, carry the layer stack's relocate mapping on the nested reference record.
Use the arc-local relocate mapping to hide source paths, expose relocated target paths, suppress stale target collisions, and redirect remote-source reads to relocated source specs.
Remap reference path-valued targetPaths and connectionPaths through the accumulated reference mapping and arc-local relocate mapping.
Report ancestral-relocate authoring errors as recoverable diagnostics without making generated stage open invalid.

items.deferred_reason: Reference asset resolution and resource opening should be introduced in a later loader contract that consumes usd-layer-open and usd-resource-protocol.
Payload composition includes load policy and is intentionally separate from direct reference composition.
